content: {"vocabulary":[{"word":"maison","translation":"Haus","pronunciation":"[mɛzɔ̃]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Ma maison est grande.","exampleTranslation":"Mein Haus ist groß.","usageNote":""},{"word":"chambre","translation":"Zimmer","pronunciation":"[ʃɑ̃bʁ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Ma chambre est propre.","exampleTranslation":"Mein Zimmer ist sauber.","usageNote":""},{"word":"lit","translation":"Bett","pronunciation":"[li]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le lit est grand.","exampleTranslation":"Das Bett ist groß.","usageNote":""},{"word":"table","translation":"Tisch","pronunciation":"[tabl]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La table est en bois.","exampleTranslation":"Der Tisch ist aus Holz.","usageNote":""},{"word":"chaise","translation":"Stuhl","pronunciation":"[ʃɛz]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il y a trois chaises.","exampleTranslation":"Es gibt drei Stühle.","usageNote":""},{"word":"fenêtre","translation":"Fenster","pronunciation":"[fənɛtʁ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La fenêtre est ouverte.","exampleTranslation":"Das Fenster ist geöffnet.","usageNote":""},{"word":"porte","translation":"Tür","pronunciation":"[pɔʁt]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La porte est fermée.","exampleTranslation":"Die Tür ist geschlossen.","usageNote":""},{"word":"étagère","translation":"Regal","pronunciation":"[etaʒɛʁ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Les livres sont sur l'étagère.","exampleTranslation":"Die Bücher sind auf dem Regal.","usageNote":""},{"word":"télévision","translation":"Fernseher","pronunciation":"[televizjɔ̃]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Je regarde la télévision.","exampleTranslation":"Ich schaue Fernsehen.","usageNote":""},{"word":"ordinateur","translation":"Computer","pronunciation":"[ɔʁdinatœʁ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"L'ordinateur est sur la table.","exampleTranslation":"Der Computer ist auf dem Tisch.","usageNote":""},{"word":"frigo","translation":"Kühlschrank","pronunciation":"[fʁiɡo]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le frigo est plein.","exampleTranslation":"Der Kühlschrank ist voll.","usageNote":""},{"word":"éclairage","translation":"Beleuchtung","pronunciation":"[eɡləʁɑʒ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"L'éclairage est fort.","exampleTranslation":"Die Beleuchtung ist stark.","usageNote":""},{"word":"carrelage","translation":"Fliesenboden","pronunciation":"[kaʁəlaʒ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le carrelage est propre.","exampleTranslation":"Der Fliesenboden ist sauber.","usageNote":""},{"word":"rideau","translation":"Vorhang","pronunciation":"[ʁidø]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le rideau est bleu.","exampleTranslation":"Der Vorhang ist blau.","usageNote":""},{"word":"plante","translation":"Pflanze","pronunciation":"[plɑ̃t]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il y a une plante dans la chambre.","exampleTranslation":"Es gibt eine Pflanze im Zimmer.","usageNote":""}]}
